novelty_flags.label: Global
novelty_flags.one_line: The drafter handoff omitted the required 4-10 paper literature_checklist; §5 is plausible but does not provide the required per-§8 checklist mapping.

novelty_flags.label: Global
novelty_flags.one_line: The mandatory comparator_promise_table is missing, while §4 names Hoshino-Yanagi, Schroder-Oprescu-Feuerriegel-Kallus, and Savje as closest comparators without any §8 statement phrased as a strict tightening/frontier against those published claims.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The worked hub witness uses an all-zero observable cell-mean array and puts the gap in unobserved counterfactual outcomes, so the concrete witness is degenerate for a flagship counterexample.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The feasible set matches only conditional outcome means m(P), not the observed distribution of D,S,T given Z; that is insufficient for a sharp identified set for P_{I,Z,D,S,T,Y}.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The product and joint sets inherit the same incomplete observable-law matching, so strict containment is not yet well-posed relative to the stated observable distribution P.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add matching constraints for the full observed law, including probabilities of D,S,T cells under Z, and restate T_C(P) and T_C^{prod}(P) using those constraints.
Replace or supplement Exhibit 9.1 with a nondegenerate finite witness where observed outcomes vary and the gap is not carried solely by hidden counterfactual outcomes.

Restore the missing literature_checklist and comparator_promise_table, with one row per flagship statement and location anchors for Hoshino-Yanagi, Imai-Jiang-Malani, Savje, Schroder et al., and Nibbering-Oosterveen.

recommended_next_step: Revise the observable-law constraints and the witness, then rerun the novelty review against the restored checklist/comparator table.
